title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Dry Nose
description: Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils contains compounds like camphor, borneol, and bornyl acetate. These constituents have decongestant and expectorant properties, helping to clear mucus from the nasal passages. The camphor in the oil also has anti-inflammatory effects, reducing swelling and congestion in the nose. Additionally, the bornyl acetate helps to break down and thin mucus, making it easier to expel. By promoting drainage and reducing inflammation, Rosmarinus officinalis esse...
